title: MEAT BIOM
description: This mod for Minecraft adds a new biome (meat biome) that will fit into any horror build.
body:
This mod for Minecraft adds a new biome, the meat biome. A new mob is added that does not hit unless you hit it. The mod also adds a new food, the heart. It can be made from 9 meat blocks. What this mod looks like, you can see in the photo.
The test update for Minecraft 1.19.4 now has more features!
